fleet.noShips: No ships yet. Add your first ship.
fleet.emptyFleet: No pledges imported yet. Use the import button to sync your RSI hangar.
fleet.searchPlaceholder: Search by pledge or ship name…
fleet.emptySubtitle: Import your fleet from RSI to get started.
fleet.errorMessage: Unable to retrieve the fleet. Retry or check the diagnostic.
fleet.form.name: Name
settings.diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
settings.diagnostic.subtitle: Logs, stats, and recovery tools.
settings.diagnostic.actions.copyLogsHelp: Copy recent operations to clipboard as JSON
settings.diagnostic.actions.clearLogsCon: Clear the log buffer? The last 200 operations will be erased.
settings.diagnostic.actions.resetCacheHe: Delete cached resources for the active RSI account
settings.diagnostic.actions.resetCacheCo: Deletes the Electron partition Cache folder for the active account. Cookies, Local Storage, and session data are preserved. Use this if RSI scraping fails with a cache error.
settings.diagnostic.devTools.seedHelp: Insert a Praetorian Pack sample pledge into the active account
settings.diagnostic.devTools.removeHelp: Delete the seeded Praetorian Pack pledge
settings.comptes.title: ACCOUNTS
settings.comptes.subtitle: MANAGE YOUR CONFIGURED RSI ACCOUNTS
settings.comptes.emptySubtitle: Link a Roberts Space Industries account to start syncing your fleet.
settings.dataSyncSubtitle: Manage external RSI API handshakes and local telemetry ingestion.
settings.forceResyncDesc: Manually initiate the automated cycles to fetch the latest fleet data, UEX statuses, and technical telemetry directly from the RSI servers.
settings.notifSectionSubtitle: Configure telemetry priority and bridge communication protocols.
settings.notifInsuranceDesc: Notify 24h prior to LTI/SHI expiration dates.
settings.notifFleetUpdatesDesc: Receive alerts on ship manufacturer status and patch balance changes.
settings.notifMarketDesc2: High volatility alerts for CCU chains and upgrade values.
settings.notifFleetDesc: Real-time telemetry on ship location and fuel levels.
settings.notifMarketDesc: Notifications for high-value trade route price shifts.
settings.notifSystemDesc: Firmware updates and low-priority bridge diagnostics.
dashboard.secureDesc: Fleet insurance coverage and rapid asset access.
dashboard.systemCheck: System check: ok · Fuel: 98% · Quantum: standby
loadout.noShips: No ships in fleet. Add ships via My Fleet first.
loadout.noSlots: No slots. Add a slot to begin.
loadout.selectSlotFirst: Select a slot to choose a component.
loadout.noPresets: No presets. Fill fields manually in Selected Slot.
loadout.statsEmpty: Add slots and equip components to see stats.
loadout.previewMode: Ship not owned — add it to your fleet to save a loadout
loadout.emptySubtitle: Select a ship from My Fleet to open its loadout planner.
comparator.noData: No ship data. Sync UEX data from My Fleet first.
comparator.selectToChart: Select a vessel to render chart.
comparator.selectToCompare: Select two vessels above to compare stats.
comparator.emptyFleet: Add ships in My Fleet to compare them here.
comparator.subtitle: // Side-by-side tactical analysis
comparator.strategicAdvantage: {{winner}} outperforms {{loser}} by {{pct}} pts in {{axis}}, making it the superior choice for missions that demand this capability.
comparator.strategicTie: Both vessels share nearly identical tactical profiles across all measured axes.
insurance.subtitle: // Fleet coverage · expiry alerts
insurance.ltiDesc: (Lifetime Insurance) is permanent and does not require manual renewal. Standard (SHI) insurance must be renewed in aUEC before the expiry date to avoid coverage interruption.
insurance.autoRenewalPost: Please ensure sufficient UEX balances for manual renewals. Expiry changes are currently tracked.
datamining.consent.title: Offline Datamining — Enable?
datamining.consent.description: SC Fleet Manager detected your Star Citizen installation ({{channel}}). Would you like to enable offline synchronisation of ship and component data from your local game files? This source is generally more up-to-date than SC Wiki. No data is sent externally. You can disable this at any time in Settings.
datamining.patch.title: New Star Citizen patch detected
datamining.patch.description: A new version of Star Citizen has been installed. Ship data can be refreshed from the game files to reflect the patch.
craftingHub.subtitle: Catalogue of all known crafting blueprints, extracted from the game. Search, filter by category, and quick access to recipes (detailed view coming soon).
craftingHub.toast.noAccountMsg: Select an account before running the resync.
craftingHub.toast.noLogMsg: Couldn't locate your Star Citizen installation. Set the game folder in Settings > Data Sync.
craftingHub.detail.noIngredients: No ingredient referenced for this blueprint.
craftingHub.detail.findResource: See where to find this resource
craftingHub.detail.noReactiveStats: No reactive stat for this blueprint
craftingHub.detail.noLinkedMissions: No mission rewards this blueprint in the datamined pools.
craftingHub.mission.notFoundMsg: This mission is not available in the current list.
craftingHub.ing.locationsCount: {{n}} location(s) referenced in the game data.
craftingHub.ing.subtitleFallback: Data extracted from the game — provider→preset→mineable.
missionIntel.noneSyncedText: Run a synchronization from the Data Sync settings.
missionIntel.card.dataminedAria: Mission extracted from the game files
missionIntel.detail.noScope: No reputation scope linked to this mission.
missionIntel.obj.scopeUnmapped: Scope not mapped — progress tracking unavailable
missionIntel.obj.noMissionForFaction: No mission found for this faction
missionIntel.obj.comingSoonMsg: Detailed optimal plan available in Phase 25a.5.4.
missionIntel.obj.emptyText: Add missions as objectives from the Missions tab to track your progress.
missionIntel.fav.emptyText: Save your favorite missions to find them quickly and plan your runs. Click ☆ from the Missions tab or a mission detail.
dataSync.subtitle: // Data sources and extraction
dataSync.rsiActivateHint: Activate an account in the Accounts tab
dataSync.dmConsentNote: Reads the local game files (Data.p4k). No data is sent externally.
dataSync.dmNotDetectedNote: Install the game or set the install folder to enable datamining.
dataSync.scPathInvalid: Game.log not found at this path
dataSync.scPathHelp: Point this at your game channel folder (the one containing Data.p4k and Game.log, e.g. …\StarCitizen\LIVE). Used by datamining and the Crafting Hub blueprint resync.
dataSync.genSyncOnLaunchDesc: Synchronizes the catalog (ships, components, missions) at app launch if the data is stale.
dataSync.genRsiRefreshDesc: Resyncs the RSI hangar at the chosen interval. Only when a session is active — otherwise skipped, never a confirmation pop-up.
dataSync.genAutoPatchDesc: Detects a Star Citizen version change since the last extraction and sends a notification.
dataSync.genLastFullSyncDesc: Most recent synchronization across all sources.
dataSync.ccuNote: Fetches the full RSI upgrade matrix (~150 ships). Takes a few minutes; you can cancel anytime.
dataSync.ccuToastAborted: CCU sync cancelled — partial catalog kept.
hudCustom.subtitle: // Theme, layout and accessibility
hudCustom.sidebarPositionDesc: Show the navigation bar on the left or right of the screen.
hudCustom.sidebarCollapsedDesc: Starts the app with the bar in rail mode (icons only). The bar button expands it at any time.
hudCustom.animatedStarsDesc: Animated space background behind the interface.
hudCustom.autoLaunchDesc: Starts SC Fleet Manager on Windows startup. (applied immediately)
notif.subtitle: // Delivery channels and tracked events
notif.insuranceExpiryDesc: Lead time before expiry at which an alert is raised.
notif.insuranceExpiredDesc: A single notification when a ship loses its insurance (no repeated reminder).
notif.minedMissionsDesc: After an extraction, if new missions were added to the catalog.
notif.newPatchDesc: Detects a game version change and notifies it. Setting shared with the Sync tab.
notif.inAppDesc: Shows a toast in the application. The notification log is still recorded.
notif.systemDesc: Shows a Windows pop-up for alerts.
account.create.initialDesc: Sign in to your RSI account to add a new session. Your credentials are never read by this application.
account.create.step2: Sign in with your RSI credentials in the window that opens
account.create.step3a: Once signed in, navigate manually to
account.create.step4: Synchronization starts automatically as soon as you reach the Hangar page
account.create.handleHint: Will be verified automatically on sign-in.
account.create.loggingInDesc: A window has opened. Sign in to your RSI account. This window will close automatically after sign-in.
account.create.loggingInWarn: ⚠ Wait 3 seconds before entering your email and password. The app performs an automatic initialization of the RSI window.
account.create.confirmNotDetected: Handle not detected automatically. Enter it manually.
account.create.importFailed: Account created. Pledge import failed. You can retry from My Fleet.
account.create.importSuccess: Account created — {{n}} ship(s) imported from your RSI hangar.
account.create.skipImport: Account created. You can import your fleet later from My Fleet.
account.delete.title: DELETE COMMANDER
account.edit.title: EDIT COMMANDER
session.tipExpired: RSI reconnection required. Click to recheck.
session.tipNeverLogged: No RSI session. Import from RSI to connect.
fleet.rsiScrapeFailed: RSI scrape failed. Check your session.
fleet.login.activeDesc: RSI session active. You can import your hangar.
fleet.login.desc: Sign in to robertsspaceindustries.com to import your hangar. Your credentials are never stored.
fleet.import.title: RSI Hangar Import
insurance.renew.title: RENEW POLICY
insurance.renew.infoBanner: Select the coverage level and the insurance duration. The expiry date is computed automatically on save.
insurance.renew.noAccount: No RSI account configured. Connect an RSI account first.
insurance.lti.title: LIFETIME INSURANCE
insurance.lti.caption: No expiry · No renewal required
insurance.lti.description: This vessel holds a Lifetime Insurance policy. Coverage is permanent and does not require renewal. The policy cannot be downgraded to a Standard Hull Insurance policy from this interface.
loadout.noHardpoints: No hardpoints found for this vessel
starmap.noData: No cartographic data — run a datamining extraction.
startPage.subtitle: AUTHORIZED BIOMETRIC LINK REQUIRED
items.empty: No items or cosmetics in your hangar yet.

ccuChain.filters.label: FILTERS
ccuChain.state.catalogEmpty: The CCU catalog is empty. Sync it from Data Sync settings to use the chain finder.
ccuChain.state.staleWarning: Catalog is over 7 days old — consider a resync for accurate prices.
ccuChain.state.pickBoth: Pick a FROM and a TARGET ship to find upgrade chains.
ccuChain.state.noPaths: No chain found with the current filters.
